value.0:
If cast on a player:
- Display attributes 
- Change alignment 
- Give the player a full map of the area
- Follow the player
- Force the player to follow you
- Cancel player's actions
- Work with inventory: take items, destroy items, identify/unidentify items, examine items
- Penguin the player - paralyze the player, and turn him into a penguin
- Unpenguin the player
- Boot the PC out of the game
- Roll a skill or ability check
- Join the PC's party
- Leave the party

If cast on a creature:
- Display attributes 
- Change alignment 
- Follow the creature
- Force the creature to follow you
- Tell the creature to run the "nw_c2_default9" script (resumes waypoint walking)
- Kill creature, leaving a corpse
- Change All Players or One Players faction with this creatures faction.

If cast on a creature or selectable object:
- Destroy this object
- Turn this object on or off 
- Work with inventory: take items, destroy items, identify/unidentify items, examine items

If cast without a target:
- Reload the current running module 
- Advance the current time of day by one, three, or five hours
- Advance to the next day or night period
- Destroy an object that is close by (includes untargettable objects)
- Turn an object that is close by on or off
- List All Player Names with their Character Names.
- Jump to a PC 
- Jump a PC to you
- Jump PC's party to you

By Jhenne and Doppleganger
